security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://marine-api.open-meteo.com https://api.open-meteo.com; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Bali surf forecast, swell, wind & tides in one desktop app
bundle.longDescription: Ombak Bagus is a personal Windows desktop app that brings Bali surf forecasts, swell reports, wind, and tide charts into one place so you can decide where and when to paddle out.
